name: research-logic-map
description: Generate Chinese Mermaid research logic diagrams from user input and render them to SVG and PNG.

interface.shortDescription: Generate Chinese Mermaid logic maps with PNG and SVG outputs.
interface.longDescription: Research Logic Map turns research notes, thesis ideas, advisor discussions, or project prompts into Chinese Mermaid flowcharts, then renders the result as SVG and PNG files for reports and presentations.
defaultPrompt: 根据我的研究想法生成中文 Mermaid 逻辑图
读取 chat.md 并输出研究逻辑图 PNG 和 SVG
把导师沟通记录整理成研究路线图
